name: Outdoor Mushroom Shaped Glass Watering Orb Clear - Threshold™
description:
Keep your favorite plants hydrated with the Outdoor Mushroom Shaped Glass Watering Orb from Threshold™. Made with glass in a cool mushroom-like shape, this white watering orb adds decorative appeal to your space. Best of all, this mushroom-shaped watering orb boasts a break-resistant design for added convenience.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
